quote: During Aryan’s internship at Exicom Technologies, he consistently demonstrated exceptional programming skills, a strong work ethic, and an eagerness to take ownership of complex tasks. He quickly grasped our mission-critical systems and contributed to projects that required both precision and creativity. Aryan’s collaborative spirit made him a valued member of the team, and his clear, proactive communication ensured smooth coordination across departments. I was particularly impressed by his ability to deliver high-quality solutions under tight timelines. I have no doubt that Aryan will excel in any challenge he takes on, and I wholeheartedly recommend him to any future endeavor
name: Raghav Agarwal

quote: I am pleased to recommend Aryan Maheshwari, an exceptional student from the AI & Data Science program at KJ Somaiya Institute of Technology. Throughout his B.Tech, Aryan consistently demonstrated outstanding technical skills, deep curiosity for machine learning, and a problem-solving mindset.With a stellar GPA of 9.4, he excelled in both academic and practical domains—contributing to impactful projects like Semantic Segmentation in Self-Driving Cars and Stock Price Prediction Using LSTM. His strong grasp of advanced mathematics, ML techniques, and participation in hackathons and Kaggle competitions set him apart as a well-rounded talent.Beyond his technical ability, Aryan stands out for his leadership, collaboration, and clear communication of complex ideas. His integrity, reliability, and drive for excellence make him an asset in any academic or professional setting. I have no doubt he will excel in all future endeavors.
name: Dr. Milind Nemade
role: Professor and Head of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Department, KJ Somaiya Institute of Technology

quote: Aryan’s time at AGIE AI was marked by outstanding technical execution and creativity. He spearheaded the development of a Dialogflow-based WhatsApp chatbot integrated with Vertex AI, significantly improving user engagement and interaction flow. His ability to merge technical precision with creativity was evident in the customized astrology animations he built using Manim, delivering complex mathematical visualizations that perfectly aligned with client needs. Aryan also developed a highly impactful Proof of Concept using LLMs for semantic similarity scoring, enabling automated data extraction that streamlined insights for AI startups. His work ethic, problem-solving skills, and clear communication made him an invaluable asset to our team, and I am confident he will excel in any future challenge.
name: Chetan Kumar

quote: As the faculty advisor for an AI-powered sports simulation project, I worked with Aryan for two months while he led a team of eight interns. In that time, he showed strong organizational skills, kept communication clear, and maintained steady progress toward milestones. He was able to coordinate well between technical and non-technical contributors, and approached challenges constructively. While our time working together was brief, he made a positive contribution to the project and showed promise in a leadership role. A rare gem!
name: Scott Easley
role: Senior Lecturer USC Games, USC Viterbi School of Engineering - Department of Computer Science

quote: I’ve had the opportunity to work closely with Aryan over the past several months on a research and analytics initiative, where he has served as the sole research assistant supporting our work. Throughout this collaboration, he has consistently demonstrated exceptional ownership, professionalism, and intellectual maturity well beyond his level. As the primary RA on the project, Aryan has taken full responsibility for driving analyses forward-from structuring ambiguous research questions to implementing rigorous methodologies and synthesizing insights. He operates with a high degree of autonomy, requiring minimal oversight, while still maintaining proactive and thoughtful communication. What stands out most is his ability to combine analytical depth with disciplined execution. He approaches complex problems methodically, breaks them into well-defined components, and delivers work that is both technically sound and practically actionable. His organization, reliability, and clarity in communication have made collaboration seamless and highly productive. Aryan is detail-oriented, dependable, and comfortable operating in fast-paced research environments where initiative and self-direction are critical. I am confident he will continue to grow into increasingly impactful roles, and I strongly recommend him for opportunities that demand rigor, ownership, and strong collaborative ability!
name: Tiffany Yau
role: Ph.D. Student at USC Marshall School of Business | Former entrepreneur, VC
